package rulecoverage

func PositiveOsExecCommandWithUserInput() string {
    ruleID := "os_exec_command_with_user_input"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`exec.Command(userInput)` or `exec.Command(\"sh\", \"-c\", variable)` where the command string appears to come from a function parameter or request binding"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
